origin.name: Mexico
origin.post_mortem_trigger: All violent, sudden, suspicious, or unexplained deaths. SEMEFO routinely involved for non-natural deaths.
origin.semefo_note: SEMEFO (Servicio Medico Forense) is Mexico's forensic medical service. All unexpected or violent deaths are referred to SEMEFO. Body cannot be released until SEMEFO and Ministerio Publico authorise release.
origin.resort_note: Deaths in Cancun, Los Cabos, and Puerto Vallarta handled locally but often involve SEMEFO. Tourist police experienced with foreign family needs.
origin.key_document: Acta de defuncion with certified English translation and SEMEFO release document
origin.source: FCDO Mexico travel advice, updated 2025; British Embassy Mexico City guidance

destinations.name: United Kingdom
key_documents: Acta de defuncion with certified English translation

airlines.name: American Airlines
airlines.routes: MEX to LHR (via DFW or JFK)

special_rules: SEMEFO examination is mandatory for all violent, sudden, or unexplained deaths. Cannot be bypassed.
Acta de defuncion is in Spanish. Certified English translation mandatory.
Resort deaths (Cancun, Los Cabos) handled locally but still involve SEMEFO for unexpected deaths.
destinations.dest_reception: The UK funeral director takes custody at the cargo terminal. All Mexican documentation must be in certified English. The coroner for the district is notified.
destinations.dest_consular_note: FCDO 24-hour emergency line: +44 (0)20 7008 5000. British Embassy Mexico City and consulate in Cancun can register the death and advise.
destinations.seo_title: Mexico to UK Repatriation: Guidance for British Families
destinations.seo_description: Someone has died in Mexico. Repatriation to the UK takes 14-28 days. SEMEFO release, Spanish documentation, and cargo flights explained. Contact us 24/7.

destinations.name: Ireland
key_documents: Acta de defuncion with certified English translation

airlines.name: Aeromexico
airlines.routes: MEX to DUB (via CDG or AMS)

special_rules: Irish Embassy in Mexico City handles consular matters.
SEMEFO and certified English translation requirements apply identically to Irish repatriations.
destinations.dest_reception: The Irish funeral director takes custody at the cargo terminal. All Mexican documentation must be in certified English. The Coroner is notified.
destinations.dest_consular_note: Department of Foreign Affairs emergency line: +353 1 408 2000. The Irish Embassy in Mexico City can register the death and advise.
destinations.seo_title: Mexico to Ireland: Funeral Repatriation Guidance
destinations.seo_description: Someone has died in Mexico and needs to come home to Ireland. 14-28 days. SEMEFO release and all documentation handled. Contact us 24/7.
